text: Day 0: Toast component dispatched a fetch on unmount and the AbortController never fired.
Day 1: Vite dev server crashed when two plugins claimed the same name property.
Day 2: Hydration mismatch on server-rendered date — used Intl.DateTimeFormat with a fixed locale.
Day 3: Added an aria-label to the icon button so screenreaders can announce it.
Day 4: Added a service worker fallback for /api responses to keep the offline demo functional.
